prompt: Using REFERENCE_0 as the character and outfit base, transform the anime illustration into a realistic live-action fashion photograph while preserving the recognizable concept: long dark wavy hair, cigarette, white lab coat, dark crop top, black mini skirt, confident frontal attitude, motorcycles, and neon nightlife mood. Make the character a real adult woman with natural human facial features and realistic skin, hair, fabric, smoke, and lighting. Change the pose to a full-body standing stance with legs apart, hands tucked in the lab coat pockets, facing the camera with a serious expression. Change the setting into a rainy Japanese neon entertainment street at night with wet reflective pavement, dense illuminated vertical signboards, and motorcycles parked on both sides; include visible Japanese-style neon signage such as 赤様横丁. Keep the cigarette in her mouth with smoke rising above her head. Add glossy black high heels and make the black skirt more realistic and shiny with a thigh slit/zipper detail. Use cinematic shallow depth of field, high-contrast neon reflections, photorealistic editorial styling, vertical 9:16 composition, no anime rendering, no cartoon outlines, no extra characters, no watermark.
